2355330.name: Solar System Simulator
2355330.description:
In this game you can explore almost any moon or planet of our solar system and visit remarkable nearby stars and see their location in the Milky Way. But you can also change existing bodies or add new ones and make a solar system of your own. The simulation will then act as a gravity and physics sandbox and recalculate orbits in line with Newton's laws.

This is the desktop version of the mobile game "Solar System Simulator", which has so far accumulated more than 3 million downloads on Android and iOS combined . This desktop version offers higher quality texture and height maps and smoother gameplay. More features will be added to the game.
2355330.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 印度尼西亚语, 日语, 韩语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
